ab: lokah su, nanu besun su?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: pbes cu qutux kopu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: lokah su, nanu besun su?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: pbes cu qutux qbubu.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: pbes cu kopu, cyan cimu tbes ga?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: maki ay, pisa besun su?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: cyan cimu tbes binro uyi ga?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ini ay, ini cami tbes binro.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: pbes cu bwax.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: pisa cnabu besum su?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: biqi cu tyungan cnabu na bwax.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: pbes cu ngahi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: wal suqun tbes ngahi myan la.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: pbes cu saying yuyut abura.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: qutux calay yuyut nyan sthay la.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: praxi cu mes cikay batu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: pisa batu besun su?
en: B: How many eggs do you want to buy?

ab: pisa batu besun su?
en: A: How many eggs do you want to buy?

ab: pbes cu mpux batu.
en: B: I want to buy ten eggs.

ab: pbes cu saying nhol na nexi.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tyugan nhol nyan sthay la, si ali qabax qani la.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pisa pila nya qutux cnabu na bwax qani?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: qutux cnabu ga, saying qbhol pila.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: mpusan qutux pila qabax, mpusan pila biqi cu mica la.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: mhway su calay.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: qesu mpux lpgan magan pila cqani.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: ptmwan cu mes loyi, thkun mu ski qutux kbhol pila.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: magan kbhol mpux pila qabax.
en: A:All $510.

ab: magan kbhol pila si cu hali kesan lga?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: hmet ciyan la, hali cu khway hayi ga?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: iyat kbaqun ay, wayal misu halan khway lay.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: pbes cu qutux kasi qani.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: mtiyul pila nya qani, ato na besun su ga?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
